muxt generate -v
stdout 'generating handler for pattern GET /'
stdout 'generating handler for pattern GET /hidden'

-- go.mod --
module server

go 1.22
-- template.go --
package server

import (
	"embed"
	"html/template"
)

//go:embed all:templates
var templatesDir embed.FS

var templates = template.Must(template.ParseFS(templatesDir, "templates/*/*.gohtml"))
-- templates/pages/index.gohtml --
{{define "GET /" }}
	<h1>Hello, world!</h1>
{{end}}
-- templates/pages/_hidden.gohtml --
{{define "GET /hidden" }}
	<h1>Hello, from a file the all: prefix embedded!</h1>
{{end}}
